title: The connectome of an insect brain
abstract: We present the complete connectome of an insect brain -- the larval Drosophila brain -- with all 3,016 neurons and 548,000 synapses, revealing multi-layered network motifs and brain-wide circuit architecture.
notes: Already in existing 102. Cross-listed under Michael Winding as first author. Also filed under cardona/cardona-2023-insect-connectome.
